title: Domain Parameter Change Schema
description: Schema for validating requested dashboard parameter changes.

change_id.description: Unique identifier for this parameter change request.

domain_state_id.description: The ID of the domain state being modified.

owner_player_id.description: The player ID requesting the change.

parameter_id.description: The ID of the parameter being changed (e.g., 'enemy_density_bias').

requested_delta.description: The requested change value (e.g., 0.15 for a 15% increase).

benefit_declared.description: A description of the declared benefit of this change.

costs_paid.description: Resources paid to enact this change.

risks_incurred.description: List of risks/drawbacks incurred by this change.

owner_affected.description: Must be true. The owner must be affected by this change.

playability_preserved.description: Must be true. Playability must be preserved.

primary_route_preserved.description: Must be true. Primary routes must be preserved.

risk_advantage_equilibrium_preserved.description: Must be true. Risk-advantage equilibrium must be preserved.

forbidden_flags.description: Flags to ensure anti-exploit principles are maintained.

free_advantage.description: Must always be false. No free advantages should be granted.

owner_immunity.description: Must always be false. Owner should not be immune to domain effects.

positive_only_upgrade.description: Must always be false. Upgrades should have downsides.

softlock_risk.description: Must always be false. No risk of softlocking the domain.
